decisions.description: Checks if input vars are vallid
decisions.name: dec_01_Check_Input
decisions.label: 1. Check Input

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_DR
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 ) OR ( 3 AND 4 ) OR ( 5 AND 6 ) OR ( 7 AND 8 ) OR ( 9 AND 10 ) OR ( 11 AND 12 ) OR ( 13 AND 14 ) OR ( 15 AND 16 ) OR ( 17 AND 18 ) OR 19 OR (20 AND 21 ) OR ( 22 AND 23 ) OR 24 OR ( 25 AND 26)
rules.label: DR

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_FL
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8)
rules.label: FL

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_GE
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR 5 OR (6 AND 7) OR (8 AND 9) OR (10 AND 11) OR (12 AND 13) OR (14 AND 15) OR (16 AND 17) OR (18 AND 19) OR (20 AND 21) OR 22 OR (23 AND 24) OR (25 AND 26) OR (27 AND 28)
rules.label: GE

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_GR
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR 3 OR (4 AND 5 ) OR ( 6 AND 7 ) OR ( 8 AND 9 ) OR ( 10 AND 11 ) OR ( 12 AND 13 ) OR ( 14 AND 15 ) OR ( 16 AND 17 ) OR ( 18 AND 19 ) OR ( 20 AND 21)
rules.label: GR

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_LI
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 ) OR ( 3 AND 4 ) OR ( 5 AND 6 ) OR ( 7 AND 8)
rules.label: LI

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_NB
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 ) OR ( 3 AND 4 ) OR ( 5 AND 6 ) OR ( 7 AND 8 ) OR ( 9 AND 10 ) OR ( 11 AND 12 ) OR ( 13 AND 14)
rules.label: NB

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_NH
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR 5 OR (6 AND 7) OR (8 AND 9) OR 10
rules.label: NH

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_OV
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 ) OR ( 3 AND 4 ) OR ( 5 AND 6 ) OR ( 7 AND 8 ) OR ( 9 AND 10 ) OR ( 11 AND 12 ) OR ( 13 AND 14 ) OR ( 15 AND 16 ) OR ( 17 AND 18 ) OR ( 19 AND 20 ) OR ( 21 AND 22)
rules.label: OV

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_UT
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR 3 OR ( 4 AND 5) OR ( 6 AND 7) OR ( 8 AND 9) OR ( 10 AND 11) OR ( 12 AND 13) OR ( 14 AND 15) OR ( 16 AND 17) OR ( 18 AND 19) OR ( 20 AND 21) OR ( 22 AND 23)
rules.label: UT

rules.name: dec_01_NL_Province_ZH
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10) OR 11 OR (12 AND 13) OR (14 AND 15)
rules.label: ZH

Flow.description: Get Province Code and Sales Region from Country and Postal Code
Flow.interviewLabel: asf - General - NL - Sales Region and/or State {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: asf - General - NL - Sales Region and/or State

variables.description: The Country (Code ) to determin the sales region
variables.name: vCountryCode

variables.description: The Zip or postal code to turned in to a (sales) region
variables.name: vPostalCode
